validation.decimal: The :attribute field must have :decimal decimal places.

validation.different: The :attribute field and :other must be different.
validation.digits_between: The :attribute field must be between :min and :max digits.

validation.distinct: The :attribute field has a duplicate value.

validation.extensions: The :attribute field must have one of the following extensions: :values.

validation.image: The :attribute field must be an image.
validation.in_array_keys: The :attribute field must contain at least one of the following keys: :values.

validation.ip: The :attribute field must be a valid IP address.

validation.list: The :attribute field must be a list.

trans.enrollment_existing_record_message: A record already exists for this identity. Please use the returning student flow to continue.

trans.maintenance_students_section_descr: Queue CSV exports for enrolments and applications, and review students with invalid ID numbers.
trans.maintenance_users_description: Student-role accounts that are not enrolled: no student profile, an application in review, waitlisted, or verified, or a profile without programmes — and with no active enrolment.
trans.maintenance_users_purge_confirm: Permanently delete this user and all associated account data? This cannot be undone.
trans.maintenance_users_purge_confirm_in: You are about to permanently purge the account for :name.
trans.maintenance_users_bulk_purge_confi: You are about to permanently purge :count selected user account(s) without a student profile.
trans.maintenance_users_purge_items_head: The following will be permanently deleted:
trans.maintenance_users_bulk_purge_confi: Permanently delete :count selected user(s) without a student profile? This cannot be undone.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_descripti: Download the template, fill in staff details, upload for preview, then confirm to create or update staff records.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_file_too_: The import file must not exceed 10 MB.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_invalid_f: The file must be an Excel or CSV spreadsheet.
The file format is invalid. Use the downloaded template.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_preview_f: Could not preview the import file.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_preview_e: The preview has expired. Upload the file again.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_preview_m: The preview token is invalid for this import.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_preview_s: :creates to create, :updates to update, :skipped skipped, :failed failed.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_preview_c: Review the rows below, then confirm to import.
Fix failed rows before confirming the import.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_preview_n: No valid staff rows to import.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_no_rows: No valid staff rows to import.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_result_fa: Rows that could not be saved
trans.maintenance_staff_import_lookup_no: :field ":value" was not found. Check the Lookups sheet.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_invalid_r: Role ":role" is not allowed for staff import.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_role_not_: Role ":role" does not exist in the system.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_duplicate: Employee number is already assigned to another staff member.
Email is already assigned to another user.
Phone number is already assigned to another user.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_instructi: Required columns: employee number, title, name, gender, marital status, employment type, date of birth, email, phone, department.
Department must match a name listed on the Lookups sheet.
Date of birth must be YYYY-MM-DD.
Roles are optional. Use comma-separated slugs from the Lookups sheet.
Existing staff are matched by employee number, then email, and updated when found.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_invalid_e: The email field must be a valid email address.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_invalid_p: The phone number field is required.
trans.maintenance_staff_import_invalid_d: The date of birth field must be a valid date.
trans.maintenance_export_student_enrolme: Export finalised student enrolments to Student_Enrollment.csv. The file is generated in the background and emailed when ready.
trans.maintenance_export_confirm_message: Queue a student enrollment CSV export? You will receive an email when the file is ready.
trans.maintenance_export_queued_message: Student enrollment export queued. You will receive an email when it is ready.
trans.maintenance_export_recipient_email: Enter one or more email addresses separated by commas.
Enter at least one email address to receive the export.
One or more email addresses are invalid.
trans.maintenance_export_applications_de: Export accepted and enrolled student applications to Application.csv. One row per student is included, preferring enrolled programmes. The file is generated in the background and emailed when ready.
trans.maintenance_export_application_con: Queue an application CSV export? You will receive an email when the file is ready.
trans.maintenance_export_application_que: Application export queued. You will receive an email when it is ready.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_descriptio: ID numbers are a unique field in the system.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_page_descr: Students listed below have a national ID number that does not match the required format (e.g. 63-1234567N63). Rows marked Duplicate — merge already match another account and should be compared before saving. Ready to fix rows can be corrected and saved directly. Manual correction rows need a valid ID entered by hand.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_fix_failur: Could not update the student ID number.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_student_no: This student does not have an invalid ID number.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_id_conflic: This ID number is already assigned to another student. Compare the accounts and merge if they are duplicates.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_merge_desc: These accounts share the same national ID. Choose which account to keep. All data from the other account will be moved into the survivor, then the duplicate account will be permanently removed.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_merge_conf: Merge these accounts? This cannot be undone.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_merge_fail: Could not merge the student accounts.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_merge_same: Cannot merge an account with itself.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_merge_targ: The conflicting student account could not be found.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_merge_id_m: The proposed ID does not match the existing account.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_merge_inva: The survivor must be one of the two accounts being merged.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_merge_reje: Reject this application? This cannot be undone.
This application does not belong to either account being merged.
trans.maintenance_faulty_data_merge_succ: The duplicate account has been removed and all records are now on the survivor profile below.
